hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.file_path // ""' | grep -q '\.tsx$' || exit 0; jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | grep -qE '(components/ui/|mocks/|\.types\.|\.constants\.)' && exit 0; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"STOP: This is a visual .tsx file edit. You MUST have completed /visual-pipeline before proceeding. If all 5 steps (discuss, research, approve, implement, verify) are done for this change, proceed. If not, invoke /visual-pipeline now. Refactors, docstrings, and import fixes are exempt."}}'
